reviewer_rows.key_point: 航天发展 should stay visible as a sentiment watch name, not as control and not as generic mirror
resolve sentiment-control contamination first so event inputs do not bind onto the wrong authority layer

interpretation: V1.25E freezes the result of the first commercial-aerospace sentiment-control boundary audit.
The key conclusion is negative: no non-formal name is clean enough to be promoted into a standalone sentiment-leadership authority layer.
The lawful next move is to refresh the role grammar so that boundary-risk names stay visible as sentiment watch names while remaining quarantined from control.
